fields.title: Professional Matrix
fields.bio: Full-Stack Developer skilled in API design, UI development, DSA , Algorithms and problem-solving. Dedicated to continuous learning and building efficient, scalable software solutions with a focus on Django and React ecosystems.
fields.ats_summary: Full-Stack Developer with hands-on experience in Django REST Framework, React, PostgreSQL, and modern web technologies. Expert in production deployment and scalable architectures.

fields.description:
Worked on production-grade platforms like VisaFarm and JobsAlign.
Contributing to authentication, API development, and AI-powered job matching.

Beautiful environment with great architecture mind . I was joined in this company with desk job and now I am working with them in remote environment .

fields.title: Charkrirbajar
fields.description: Scalable freelance platform built with Django REST Framework featuring user authentication, support, live chat, assessments, wallet and notification, and perfect job matching .
fields.ats_description:
Project Title: charkrirbajar (Freelance Marketplace Platform)

Technologies: Django REST Framework

Description:

Developed a scalable freelance marketplace platform using Django REST Framework.
Implemented secure user authentication and role-based access control for clients and freelancers.
Integrated real-time features including live chat and notifications to enhance user communication.
Built core functionalities such as job matching system, assessment modules, and digital wallet integration.
Optimized platform performance and user experience for efficient job discovery and engagement.
fields.tech_stack: Django, DRF, JWT, Database, Pandas, OOP

fields.title: TRUCKY
fields.description: Full-stack logistics app that generates optimized truck routes (ORS/OSRM) and auto-creates FMCSA-compliant HOS log sheets using real-time geocoding.
fields.ats_description: A US Based Project worked on their Driving System

fields.title: MANGO BAR
fields.description:
This is a dynamic web application developed for a juice and dessert shop to manage online orders and improve customer experience. The platform allows users to browse menu items, add products to the cart, and place orders easily.

It features a responsive design built with React, ensuring smooth performance across different devices. The system helps streamline order management while providing a user-friendly interface for customers.
fields.ats_description:
Project Title: Mango Bar  – Web Application

Technologies: React

Description:

Developed a dynamic web application for a juice and dessert shop using React.
Implemented core features including product listing, shopping cart, and order management system.
Designed a responsive user interface to ensure seamless experience across mobile and desktop devices.
Optimized application performance and navigation for efficient user interaction.
Enhanced customer experience by simplifying the ordering process.
fields.tech_stack: Python, Django, Tailwind CSS, SQLite , REACT ,JWT

fields.title: Captain AMinul Hauque IT Institute
fields.description: Captain Aminul Haque IT Institute was founded 28-01-2026 to convert the young population into the asset for the country . Alhamdulillah I got the opportunity to build this whole site and run this program for the nation .
fields.ats_description:
Organization: Captain Aminul Haque IT Institute
Duration: January 2026 – Present

Description:

Developed and deployed a fully functional Learning Management System (LMS) website for an IT training institute.
Designed the platform to support online education, course management, and student engagement.
Managed website development lifecycle including planning, design, and implementation.
Optimized user experience to ensure easy navigation and accessibility for students.
Supported digital transformation initiatives aimed at empowering youth with IT skills.

fields.title: Shikkhabatayon
fields.description: Sikkhabatayon একটি Learning Management System (LMS) ভিত্তিক ওয়েব প্ল্যাটফর্ম যেখানে শিক্ষক এবং শিক্ষা প্রতিষ্ঠান তাদের পছন্দ অনুযায়ী ক্লাস আপলোড করতে পারে। এই প্ল্যাটফর্মে ছাত্রদের জন্য personal dashboard, student management system এবং course access এর সুবিধা রয়েছে। পুরো সিস্টেমটি Django এবং React ব্যবহার করে তৈরি করা হয়েছে, যা smooth user experience এবং efficient data management নিশ্চিত করে।
fields.ats_description:
Project Title: Sikkhabatayon – Learning Management System (LMS)

Technologies: Django, React

Description:

Developed a full-stack Learning Management System (LMS) using Django (backend) and React (frontend).
Enabled teachers and educational institutions to upload and manage online classes and course content.
Implemented student management system with personalized dashboards for tracking progress and activities.
Designed responsive and user-friendly interface to enhance user experience across devices.
Built scalable architecture to support multiple users and efficient content delivery.

fields.title: grihokormi.com
fields.description:
Grihokormi.com is an online service platform designed to help people hire trusted domestic workers بسهولة and securely. The platform provides multiple layers of security to ensure safe and reliable hiring. It primarily serves urban areas where the demand for household workers is high, allowing users to quickly find suitable domestic help when needed.

Additionally, the platform includes a babysitting service, enabling families to hire caregivers for children. The system is designed to simplify the hiring process while ensuring trust, safety, and convenience for users.
fields.ats_description:
Project Title: Grihokormi.com – Domestic Service Hiring Platform

Description:

Developed a web-based platform for hiring domestic workers with a focus on security and reliability.
Implemented multi-level verification and safety features to ensure trusted user interactions.
Enabled users in urban areas to quickly find and hire household workers based on their requirements.
Integrated babysitting service module to support childcare hiring needs.
Designed a user-friendly interface to streamline the hiring process and improve user experience.
Built scalable system architecture to handle multiple users and service requests efficiently.

fields.title: MicroWorkHub
fields.description:
MicroworkHub is an online platform designed to distribute small and simple tasks among people across Bangladesh. The platform connects individuals who need tasks completed with those who are willing to perform micro-jobs, making it easier to earn and complete work efficiently.

It focuses on accessibility and ease of use, allowing users to quickly find, complete, and manage small-scale tasks. The system aims to create opportunities for people by providing a flexible and user-friendly environment for micro work.
fields.ats_description:
Project Title: MicroworkHub – Microtask & Freelance Platform

Description:

Developed a web-based microtask platform to distribute small-scale jobs among users across Bangladesh.
Enabled users to create, manage, and complete micro-jobs efficiently through an intuitive interface.
Designed features for task posting, assignment, and tracking to improve workflow management.
Built a scalable system to handle multiple users and concurrent task operations.
Focused on user accessibility and seamless experience to increase engagement and productivity.
fields.tech_stack: Django, DRF, JWT, Database, Pandas, OOP , REACT

fields.title: Rana IT Digital Agency
fields.description:
Ranait.cloud is a digital agency website developed to showcase the services, projects, and professional work of the agency. The platform highlights the agency’s portfolio, team collaboration, and ongoing projects, providing clients with a clear understanding of their capabilities.

It serves as both an online presence and a portfolio platform, helping the agency connect with potential clients and present their work in a professional and organized manner.
fields.ats_description:
Project Title: Rana IT Digital Agency – Digital Agency Portfolio Website

Description:

Developed a portfolio-based website for a digital agency to showcase services and completed projects.
Designed and structured responsive web pages to present agency capabilities and client work effectively.
Implemented portfolio management features to display projects, team collaborations, and case studies.
Optimized user interface and user experience (UI/UX) for better client engagement and navigation.
Contributed to strengthening the agency’s online presence and client acquisition strategy.
fields.tech_stack: Django, DRF, JWT, Database, OOP , REACT

fields.title: Authentic Furniture
fields.description:
This is a modern website developed for an Authentic Furniture company to showcase their products and services. The platform features a clean and modern user interface, making it easy for users to explore different furniture options.

A unique feature of the website allows users to upload images of their rooms and virtually place (drag and drop) furniture into the space. This helps users visualize how well the furniture fits and matches with their room before making a decision.
fields.ats_description:
Project Title: Authentic Furniture – Interactive E-commerce & Visualization Platform

Description:

Developed a modern, responsive website for a furniture company to showcase products and services.
Designed and implemented an interactive UI with advanced user experience features.
Built a room visualization system allowing users to upload room images and virtually place furniture using drag-and-drop functionality.
Enabled users to preview furniture placement and compatibility within their space before purchase decisions.
Optimized front-end performance and responsiveness for seamless cross-device experience.
fields.tech_stack: Django, DRF, JWT, Database, Pandas, OOP, Webhook , REACT

fields.title: RNR -  e-commerce
fields.description:
RNR is an e-commerce website developed to provide users with a seamless online shopping experience. The platform allows customers to browse products, view details, and make purchases بسهولة through a user-friendly interface.

The website is designed with a modern layout and smooth navigation, ensuring that users can easily find and buy products. It serves as a complete online store for showcasing and selling various items efficiently.
fields.ats_description:
Project Title: RNR – E-commerce Platform

Description:

Developed a full-featured e-commerce website to enable online product browsing and purchasing.
Implemented product listing, detailed product pages, and shopping cart functionality.
Designed a responsive and user-friendly interface to enhance customer experience and navigation.
Integrated core e-commerce features including order management and checkout process.
Optimized performance for fast loading and seamless interaction across devices.
fields.tech_stack: Django , jwt , React , Pandas, OOP , Webhook , React , Postgresql

fields.title: Alif Agro Seeds
fields.description:
Alif Agro Seeds is an e-commerce website developed for selling agricultural seeds online. The platform allows users to browse different types of seeds, view product details, and make purchases بسهولة.

It includes an integrated payment system, enabling customers to complete transactions securely. The website is designed to provide a simple and efficient shopping experience for users interested in agricultural products.
fields.ats_description:
Project Title: Alif Agro Seeds – E-commerce Platform

Description:

Developed an e-commerce website for online seed sales and agricultural product distribution.
Implemented product listing, detailed product pages, and secure payment integration.
Designed a user-friendly interface to simplify product browsing and purchasing process.
Integrated order and transaction management system for efficient operations.
Optimized platform performance and responsiveness for smooth user experience.

fields.title: Alif Marriage Media
fields.description:
Alif Marriage Media is an online platform designed to help individuals find suitable marriage partners بسهولة and securely. The system allows users to create profiles, browse potential matches, and connect with others based on their preferences.

The platform is designed with a user-friendly interface and focuses on privacy and trust, making the matchmaking process easier and more accessible for users.
fields.ats_description:
Project Title: Alif Marriage Media – Matchmaking Platform

Description:

Developed a web-based matchmaking platform to connect individuals for marriage purposes.
Implemented user profile creation, profile management, and preference-based partner search features.
Designed a secure system focusing on user privacy and data protection.
Built an intuitive and user-friendly interface to enhance user engagement and accessibility.
Optimized platform performance for smooth navigation and efficient matching experience.
fields.tech_stack: Django, DRF, JWT, Database, OOP , REACT

fields.title: The NEWS.Press
fields.description:
The News.Press is an online news portal developed to deliver the latest news and updates to users in a fast and accessible way. The platform allows users to browse different news categories, read articles, and stay informed about current events.

It features multi-language support, enabling users to switch between languages such as Bangla, English, and Hindi for a more personalized reading experience. The website is designed with a clean and user-friendly interface to ensure smooth navigation across devices.
fields.ats_description:
Project Title: The News.Press – Online News Portal

Description:

Developed a web-based news portal to publish and manage news articles across multiple categories.
Implemented content management system (CMS) for creating, editing, and organizing news content.
Integrated multi-language support (Bangla, English, Hindi) to enhance accessibility and user reach.
Designed a responsive and user-friendly interface to improve readability and engagement.
Optimized performance for fast content delivery and seamless navigation across devices.
Enabled structured content display and localization features for better user experience.
fields.tech_stack: Django, DRF, JWT, SQL , Pandas, OOP , REACT

fields.details: 6 year Bachelor Course with 1 year Internship

Here I learned CSE fundamentals which is organized by Phitron . I was the student of Batch-6 . I learned C , C++ , Python ,  html , Css , Js , DSA , Algorithm , Django and REACT  with several exams and got 80%+ marks in every exam .
